description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a white exterior, featuring a combination of flat and low-pitched tiled roofs. The structure includes a two-car garage, a main entrance with a paved walkway, and large glass windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a landscaped garden with palm trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn, all enclosed by a white perimeter wall. The backyard includes a patio area and a small pool, offering outdoor living space. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern white bungalow with flat and tiled roofs, large windows, a two-car garage, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a white wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car garage, paved walkway, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, patio, pool, and extensive glass windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the lawn, pool, and the arrangement of windows and garden features.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear wall, patio area, and additional landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and side facades
